author: hi0b
content: Found: shell.nix didn't include clippy/rustfmt — added to nativeBuildInputs so the agent_lint_commands hook can run. Also fixed two pre-existing v1 issues that would have blocked the lint hook: clippy::useless_format on src/route.rs:421 and rustfmt drift in src/main.rs and src/route.rs (blank lines around tracing!() macro args, line wrapping in #[command(...)]).
